subtasks.description: Query budget allocation by product category with cost trends (YoY/QoQ growth rates, spend distribution, variance analysis). Generate SQL with CTEs to compute category-level aggregations, rolling trends, and variance metrics.

Reconcile budget allocation data with historical spend patterns and cost drivers. Perform posture analysis on each category (growth, decline, efficiency). Generate reallocation recommendations prioritizing high ROI categories and cost optimization opportunities.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen (mid) queries budget data by category with trend calculations—multi-table joins and aggregation justify mid tier. (2) cross_recon (frontier) synthesizes SQL results with domain logic to classify category postures and generate reallocation strategy—requires inference over trends and multi-signal reasoning, justifying frontier capability. No policy_action needed: recommendation is strategic analysis, not governance approval. No multitool_plan: single workflow within SQL + reconciliation logic.

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "WITH category_quarterly AS (
  SELECT
    product,
    fiscal_year,
    fiscal_quarter,
    SUM(amount_usd) AS quarterly_spend,
    COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS license_count,
    AVG(daily_active_seats) AS avg_active_seats,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS distinct_users
  FROM consumption_facts
  GROUP BY product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter
),
category_annual AS (
  SELECT
    product,
    fiscal_year,
    SUM(amount_usd) AS annual_spend,
    COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS annual_licenses,
    AVG(daily_active_seats) AS avg_annual_seats,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS annual_users
  FROM consumption_facts
  GROUP BY product, fiscal_year
),
yoy_growth AS (
  SELECT
    a.product,
    a.fiscal_year,
    a.annual_spend,
    a.annual_licenses,
    a.avg_annual_seats,
    a.annual_users,
    b.annual_spend AS prev_year_spend,
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN b.annual_spend IS NULL OR b.annual_spend = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ((a.annual_spend - b.annual_spend) / b.annual_spend) * 100
      END, 2
    ) AS yoy_growth_pct,
    (a.annual_spend - COALESCE(b.annual_spend, 0)) AS yoy_spend_delta
  FROM category_annual a
  LEFT JOIN category_annual b
    ON a.product = b.product
    AND a.fiscal_year = b.fiscal_year + 1
),
qoq_growth AS (
  SELECT
    a.product,
    a.fiscal_year,
    a.fiscal_quarter,
    a.quarterly_spend,
    a.license_count,
    a.avg_active_seats,
    a.distinct_users,
    b.quarterly_spend AS prev_quarter_spend,
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN b.quarterly_spend IS NULL OR b.quarterly_spend = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ((a.quarterly_spend - b.quarterly_spend) / b.quarterly_spend) * 100
      END, 2
    ) AS qoq_growth_pct,
    (a.quarterly_spend - COALESCE(b.quarterly_spend, 0)) AS qoq_spend_delta
  FROM category_quarterly a
  LEFT JOIN category_quarterly b
    ON a.product = b.product
    AND (
      (a.fiscal_year = b.fiscal_year AND a.fiscal_quarter = b.fiscal_quarter + 1)
      OR (a.fiscal_year = b.fiscal_year + 1 AND a.fiscal_quarter = 1 AND b.fiscal_quarter = 4)
    )
),
total_spend_by_
